_instructions: Nhóm thống nhất 5 queries + gold answers trước khi mỗi người chạy benchmark. Xem README.md Phase 2.

queries.query: How many employees did Tesla have as of end of 2025?
queries.gold_answer: As of December 31, 2025, Tesla had 134,785 employees worldwide.
